recommendations.title: Red Tails
recommendations.overview: The story of the Tuskegee Airmen, the first African-American pilots to fly in a combat squadron during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: War and Peace
recommendations.overview: The love story of young Countess Natasha Rostova and Count Pierre Bezukhov is interwoven with the Great Patriotic War of 1812 against Napoleon's invading army.

recommendations.title: The Wall
recommendations.overview: An American sniper and his spotter engage in a deadly cat-and-mouse game with an Iraqi sniper.

recommendations.title: Sniper: The White Raven
recommendations.overview: Mykola is an eccentric pacifist who wants to be useful to humanity. When the war begins in Donbas, Mykola’s naive world is collapsing as the militants kill his pregnant wife and burn his home to the ground. Recovered, he makes a cardinal decision and

recommendations.title: The Windermere Children
recommendations.overview: The story of the pioneering project to rehabilitate child survivors of the Holocaust on the shores of Lake Windermere.

recommendations.title: Enemy at the Gates
recommendations.overview: A Russian and a German sniper play a game of cat-and-mouse during the Battle of Stalingrad in WWII.

recommendations.title: Barefoot Gen
recommendations.overview: A story about the effect of the atomic bombing of Hiroshima on a boy's life and the lives of the Japanese people.

recommendations.title: Lee
recommendations.overview: The true story of photographer Elizabeth "Lee" Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

recommendations.title: Casualties of War
recommendations.overview: During the Vietnam War, a soldier finds himself the outsider of his own squad when they unnecessarily kidnap a female villager.
